original_image_tags:
* Red "CLOSED" stamp partially visible over text.

I will be 63 yrs old in a few days.
My husband passed away 4-30-65
I have worked as Mgr of Repair Dept for the N.H. Clms Co in Manchester, N.H 44 years this month.

Very truly yours,

* Label with typed text:
MRS Levi J. Dow
Goffstown
New Hampshire 03045

elements.description: A stamped red circle containing the word 'ENCLOSURES' located in the lower central area of the handwritten text.
A vertical red stamp reading 'CORRESPONDENCE' along the right margin.
A faint blue stamped text block on the left margin containing the date 'SEP 1 3 53 PM '66' and the text 'FBI' and 'REG-O-CORR & ICONS'.
A small rectangular white label at the bottom center with the typed text 'MRS Levi J. Dow', 'Goffstown', and 'New Hampshire 03045'.

judge.reason: The descriptions contradict each other on the specific text of stamps: Description A quotes a red 'CLOSED' stamp, while Description B quotes 'ENCLOSURES' and 'CORRESPONDENCE' stamps, indicating different visual content is being hallucinated.
